personalize.solution.DatasetGroupArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset group that provides the training data.

personalize.solution.EventType.Docs: The event type (for example, 'click' or 'like') that is used for training the model. If no `eventType` is provided, Amazon Personalize uses all interactions for training with equal weight regardless of type.

personalize.solution.PerformAutoML.Docs: When true, Amazon Personalize performs a search for the best USER_PERSONALIZATION recipe from the list specified in the solution configuration (`recipeArn` must not be specified). When false (the default), Amazon Personalize uses `recipeArn` for training.

personalize.solution.PerformHPO.Docs: Whether to perform hyperparameter optimization (HPO) on the chosen recipe. The default is `false`.

personalize.solution.RecipeArn.Docs: The ARN of the recipe used to create the solution.

personalize.solution.SolutionConfig.Docs: Describes the configuration properties for the solution.
